Name: HIT_MTRL_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters applied upon hitting various materials.

Fields.Name: AI Volume Rate
Fields.Description: Normal when 1x. When set to 0, the sound radius becomes 0 (SE and SFX are unrelated game-like parameters).

Fields.Name: On Hit SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: When this hit material is hit, this SpEffect is applied to the character.

Fields.Name: On Hit SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: When this hit material is hit, this SpEffect is applied to the character.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Height Type
Fields.Description: The height at which to generate the foot effect when hitting this material.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Direction Type
Fields.Description: The direction in which to generate the foot effect when hitting this material.

Fields.Name: Floor Height Type
Fields.Description: Determines the floor height for this hit material. For floating items such as the surface of the water
